name: Deduction for Welfare Benefit Fund Contributions

eligibility.description: Employer must establish a fund (e.g., 501(c)(9) trust) and contributions are limited to the 'qualified cost' of providing benefits during the year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can deduct contributions to a welfare benefit fund (like a VEBA) to provide benefits such as medical, disability, or life insurance to employees.
